title: A DREAM ON HOW TO BE AT PEACE AND JOYFUL IN TRIBULATIONS

paragraphs.text: A DREAM ON HOW TO BE AT PEACE AND JOYFUL IN TRIBULATIONS

DAVID: As I was writing the Chapter on Peace and Joy in Tribulation, I was going through many testing of tribulation and chastening of THE FATHER. In one of the nights, I had a prophetic dream. In my dream, one of my disciples had decided to leave me and defected to a lawless minister because of an idol in his heart. Upon hearing the news, I lost my peace and joy. My third sister who was not a believer was present at that time and out of self-righteousness, she was very disgusted with him and was volunteering to send him off quickly. I was comforted and felt vindicated by her. Despite my grief, I decided to send him off myself. All this seemed to happen in our rented one room one hall government subsidized flat where my parents and my nine siblings were staying 52 years ago when I was 6 years old. My parents were struggling to raise us up in that pathetic place where we had to sleep on the floor in the hall piling up like sardines in a can. As I walked this disciple along the field behind my flat, a young Chinese man whom I could not recall where I knew him approached me. At that time, he was playing basketball with his friends. He told me that he had lost his phone, which had my contact number. The impression he gave me was that he highly esteemed me as someone he would like to learn from and follow regarding the Way of THE YAHWEH. In the midst of our exchange, somehow after speaking with one of his friends, he left with his companions without saying farewell and I was left alone and felt rejected. As I turned around, my disciple was also nowhere to be seen. Feeling lonely and forsaken, as I looked around by myself, I noticed that the field I was standing on was filled with people who were busy with their activities. They were in groups: some were doing exercises; others were playing games etc. At one corner, I noticed a Christian ministry whom I knew and they were having fellowship but they were dressed up in religious robes and were walking and worshipping as in a religious procession. Suddenly, I felt very lonely and lost again and there arose in my heart a desire to visit one of my intercessors whom I had not contacted since the prayer group was dissolved. Then, I woke up from this dream and realized that in reality, I was not that lonely
after all, for my wife, my children, SHEKINAIH and my disciples were still with me, trusting that JESUS is using me to represent him.

As I meditate on the dream, THE HOLY SPIRIT said to me, "THE FATHER has purposed for you to go through tribulations, rejections and betrayals in order to teach you a spiritual lesson that your peace and joy must not rest on the acceptance of men and you should not be so easily comforted through the vindication of others in a pathetic mentality. Neither should you long for honour from men you hardly knew, nor should you fret and be distracted by other groups who prosper according to their own devices and are busy in their religious activities after the commandments and doctrines of men which indeed seems to make a show of holiness but are without power, playing Christianity carnally in their religious hypocrisy. THE FATHER will not forsake you as He has given SHEKINAIH to represent Him to help you fulfil your destiny as a Christ, an anointed one."

Col 2:16 Let no man therefore judge you in meat, or in drink, or in respect of an holyday, or of the new moon, or of the sabbath days: Col 2:17 Which are a shadow of things to come; but the body is a Christ.
SHEKINAIH: David, THE FATHER ask me to instruct you to speak out aloud these words 100 times and meditate upon it while you speak.

These are the words: "Sincere repentance will lead to the greatest bond of love in THE TRINITY that is unbreakable for Us. Love relinquished to THE FATHER will lead to unlimited love returned back to me".

(David believed and did as he was told and after which JESUS said to him JESUS: David, you must not be bitter with SHEKINAIH because of the discipline of My FATHER through her. Humble yourself with true repentance and ask for more grace to be filled with My love for her for the sake of unity of THE TRINITY so that Our works through both of you are not hindered. As THE FATHER hath loved me, so have I loved you: continue you in My love. Love one another and you shall abide in My love. Surrender all your love to My FATHER by loving His children even willing to lay down your life for them and in return, My FATHER and I will love you and fill you with Our unlimited love and We will make Our abode with you and call you friend. These things have I spoken unto you, that My joy might remain in you, and that your joy might be full and whatsoever ye shall ask of THE FATHER in My Name, He may give it you. Joh 14:21 He that hath my commandments, and keepeth them, he it is that loveth me: and he that loveth me shall be loved of my Father, and I will love him, and will manifest myself to him. Joh 14:23 JESUS answered and said unto him, If a man love me, he will keep my words: and my Father will love him, and we will come unto him, and make our abode with him.
Joh 15:9 As THE FATHER hath loved me, so have I loved you: continue ye in my love.

Joh 15:10 If ye keep my commandments, ye shall abide in my love; even as I have kept my Father's commandments, and abide in his love. Joh 15:11 These things have I spoken unto you, that my joy might remain in you, and that your joy might be full. Joh 15:12 This is my commandment, That ye love one another, as I have loved you. Joh 15:13 Greater love hath no man than this, that a man lay down his life for his friends. Joh 15:14 Ye are my friends, if ye do whatsoever I command you. Joh 15:15 Henceforth I call you not servants; for the servant knoweth not what his lord doeth: but I have called you friends; for all things that I have heard of my Father I have made known unto you. Joh 15:16 Ye have not chosen me, but I have chosen you, and ordained you, that ye should go and bring forth fruit, and that your fruit should remain: that whatsoever ye shall ask of THE FATHER in my name, he
may give it you. Joh 15:17 These things I command you, that ye love one another.
THE FATHER: Yes, My unlimited love will energize your faith which will lead to peace and joy unto righteousness unto holiness abounding in hope of Our glory.

Rom 15:12 And again, Esaias saith, There shall be a root of Jesse, and he that shall rise to reign over the Gentiles; in him shall the Gentiles trust. Rom 15:13 Now THE ELOHIM of hope fill you with all joy and peace in believing, that ye may abound in hope, through the power of the Holy Ghost.

JESUS: Be like Me, be patient in all your tribulations by crucifying your flesh with its affection and lusts; despising all the shame you experienced; they cannot be compared with the commendation and honour and glory as the son of THE ELOHIM with joy unspeakable and full of glory ready to be revealed in the last days.

Heb 12:2 Looking unto JESUS the author and finisher of our faith; who for the joy that was set before him endured the cross, despising the shame, and is set down at the right hand of the throne of THE ELOHIM.

1Pe 1:3 Blessed be THE ELOHIM and Father of our Lord JESUS Christ, which according to his abundant mercy hath begotten us again unto a lively hope by the resurrection of JESUS Christ from the dead, 1Pe 1:4 To an inheritance incorruptible, and undefiled, and that fadeth not away, reserved in heaven for you, 1Pe 1:5 Who are kept by the power of THE ELOHIM through faith unto salvation ready to be revealed in the last time. 1Pe 1:6 Wherein ye greatly rejoice, though now for a season, if need be, ye are in heaviness through manifold temptations: 1Pe 1:7 That the trial of your faith, being much more precious than of gold that perisheth, though it be tried with fire, might be found unto praise and honour and glory in the revelation (G602 "apokalupsis") of JESUS Christ: 1Pe 1:8 Whom having not seen, ye love; in whom, though now ye see him not, yet believing, ye rejoice with joy unspeakable and full of glory: 1Pe 1:9 Receiving the end of your faith, even the salvation of your souls.

THE FATHER: My chastening is for your perfection in holiness so that you may enter into Heavenly Mount Zion to see Me. So, do not be discouraged and give up easily but pursue peace in all situations unto holiness and be not defiled by bitterness, sorrow or grief.

Heb 12:10 For they verily for a few days chastened us after their own pleasure; but he for our profit, that we might be partakers of his holiness. Heb 12:11 Now no chastening for the present seemeth to be joyous, but grievous: nevertheless afterward it yieldeth the peaceable fruit of righteousness unto them which are exercised thereby. Heb 12:12 Wherefore lift up the hands which hang down, and the feeble knees; Heb 12:13 And make straight paths for your feet, lest that which is lame be turned out of the way; but let it rather be healed. Heb 12:14 Pursue peace in the midst of everything, and holiness, without which no man shall see THE YAHWEH:
JESUS: Look unto Me, I am more than able to guard you from falling and present you faultless in the sight of My glory with exceeding joy.

Jud 1:24 Now unto him that is able to keep you from falling, and to present you faultless in (G2714 "katenopion" from G2596 "kata" according and G1799 "enopion" in sight) his glory with exceeding joy,

SHEKINAIH: I saw a man staring at a staircase which represents his tribulations. I saw both of us putting two white wings on that man. One wing is called "Peace" and the other wing is called "Joy" and it made the spirit of that man very light so that he can flies to the next level of the ascent and victoriously.

THE FATHER: My potential Brides and Anointed Ones if they will be in Joy in carrying My instructions through THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by SHEKINAIH, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT BY US, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR
respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, will cut short their testing to 10%.
